name: 13464 Flexbar Vertical Band Saw Guard
shortDescription: Provides Complete Protection Between Cutting Blade and Operator's Hands and Eyes.
longDescription:
Provides Complete Protection Between Cutting Blade and Operator's Hands and Eyes.
Features Include:
- "L" Shaped Lexan® Shield, 6"H x 6"W x 4"D
- Easy position handle
- Adjustable tension 9" long Flexbar arm permits correct setting of guard for each setup
- Includes vertical angle mounting bracket with 11" of height adjustment
- Kit includes mounting screws and self locking nuts. Simply drill and tap 2 holes and install.

Installs on most band saws with 18" maximum throat height. Optional extra-long vertical angle bracket assembly available for larger throat height machines.

name: DPG-2 Drill Press Guard for up to 18" throat
shortDescription: Available with or without a safety interlock switch.
longDescription:
Available with or without a safety interlock switch. Select when ordering. Safety switches are rated to only 2 amps and require some form of motor control to adapt to your 3 phase machine.
- Drill press safety shield protects operators from flying chips, coolant, and accidental contact with the rotating cutter / spindle. Polycarbonate shield (lexan) 1/4" thick
- Front arm swings open to the left 180 degrees for easy setup and work access
- Articulating arms allow operator to easily position the shield to fit different work-pieces or fixtures
- Installs in minutes - Truly bolt-on, no drilling required
- Clamps to the machine's round column and designed to clear the gear rack
- Heavy duty steel adjustable handles - pull out and orient 360 degrees
- Curved Lexan shield - 10" wide x 8" high with 4" deep sides.
- All CNC billet aluminum construction, Powder coated "OSHA Safety Orange"

name: DPG-ES1 Econ Series Drill Guard for 2" to 4" column diameter
shortDescription: Econ Series drill guard for small/mid-size drill presses.
longDescription:
Works on small to mid-size drill presses, bench-top and floor models.
- Billet aluminum 2 piece column clamp provides a bolt-on installation - no drilling! Installs in 5 minutes or less.
- Slotted aluminum extrusion allows adjustment in/out and up/down to clear different work setups and table heights.
- Steel adjustable lever for easy re-positioning
- Shield flips upward 180 degrees for part/drill bit change.
- Powder coated "OSHA Safety Orange"
- 1/4" thick lexan (polycarbonate) shield. See photos for dimensions on each part number guard
- Replacement drill press shields for Econ-Series are available

name: DPG-ES2 LARGE VERSION FOR 4" - 6" COLUMN DIAMETERS
shortDescription: Large version Econ Series drill guard for 4"-6" column diameters.
longDescription:
2 part numbers: DPG-ES1 and Large DPG-ES2.
- Works on small to mid-size drill presses, bench-top and floor models.
- Billet aluminum 2 piece column clamp provides a bolt-on installation - no drilling! Installs in 5 minutes or less.
- Slotted aluminum extrusion allows adjustment in/out and up/down to clear different work setups and table heights.
- Steel adjustable lever for easy re-positioning
- Shield flips upward 180 degrees for part/drill bit change.
- Powder coated "OSHA Safety Orange"
- 1/4" thick lexan (polycarbonate) shield.
- Replacement drill press shields for Econ-Series are available
- If your column is equal to or less than 4.0", but your throat is 10" or more, you can have us supply the 2" longer arm on the DPG-ES1 part number for the same price. Just add this request in the order notes or contact us first.

name: Gemco Ametek 1999SEMC PORTABLE STOP TIME METER
shortDescription: Self-contained, portable, multi-purpose diagnostic system for press room automation and operator safety device analysis.
longDescription:
The NEWLY DESIGNED Semelex unit is a self-contained, portable, multi-purpose diagnostic system for industrial press room automation and operator safety device analysis. The Semelex can quickly calculate machinery stopping time and determine the minimum safe distance for safety devices including light curtains, palm buttons, E-Stop, and safety mats.

The 1999SEMC Semelex II Safetimeter Test Set is field-proven to accurately measure press stop time and safety distance to verify compliance with federal and state requirements. Designed for harsh industrial environments, the unit is portable, lightweight, battery-operated, and easy to use.

The Semelex Safetimeter is capable of measuring elapsed time, stop time (Ts) from 1-9999 milliseconds. It also calculates the minimum safety distance (Ds) based on the OSHA formula, as understood by the factory, and will display up to 999.9 inches to the nearest 0.1 inches.

Optional 5 year limited warranty covers all yearly recalibrations add $1,724.00

name: GS-104-15  15 Amp Anti Restart Device for 110 Volt Machinery (PLUG & PLAY)
shortDescription: 15-amp Anti-Restart Control with plug-and-play setup. Includes fuse holder and latching e-stop button.
longDescription:
Anti-Restart Control 15 amp
GS-104-15 (Plug and Play)
Directly plug your machine into the GS-104 receptacle and plug the GS-104 into a standard 110-volt receptacle. Good for 1.5 H.P. motors up to 15 amps. Wall Cord is 8' long. Now includes a removable fuse holder and latching emergency stop button!!!

name: GS-104-15-PIG  15 Amp Anti Restart Device for 110 Volt Machinery (HARDWIRED VERSION)

Anti-Restart Control 15 amp
GS-104-15-PIG (Pigtail and Plug)
Hard wire the GS-104-15-PIG to your machine and plug GS-104-15-PIG into a standard 110-volt receptacle. Good for 1.5 H.P. motors up to 15 amps. The pigtail cord is 4' long and the wall cord is 8' long. Now includes a removable fuse holder and latching emergency stop button!!!

Anti-Restart Control 20 amp with Nema 4 enclosure
GS-104-20 (Plug and Play)

name: GS-104-20-PIG  20 Amp Anti Restart Device for 110 Volt Machinery (HARDWIRED VERSION)

Anti-Restart Control 20 amp
GS-104-20-PIG (Pigtail and Plug)

name: GS-105 Anti-Restart Control for Vertical Milling Machines
shortDescription: Anti-restart compliance package for Bridgeport, Sharp, Jet milling machines. Up to 5 HP.
longDescription:
GS-105 Anti-Restart Control for Vertical Milling Machines

Specifically designed for upgrading electrical compliance on milling machines such as Bridgeport, Sharp, and Jet. The GS-105 will provide anti-restart functionality, a step-down transformer, a fused main power lockable disconnect switch, start/stop, and forward-reverse operators with latching emergency stop button. (Controls will be mounted on a remote operator station or on the main control panel face). Good for motors up to 5 HP (Please provide motor horsepower, motor amperage, and line voltage when ordering).

name: GS-106 Anti-Restart Control for other three phase machinery
shortDescription: Anti-restart compliance package for grinders, lathes, drill presses, sanders, horizontal mills.
longDescription:
GS-106
Specifically designed for upgrading electrical compliance on other 3 phase machinery such as grinders, lathes, drill presses, sanders, and horizontal mills. The GS-106 will provide anti-restart functionality, a step-down transformer, a fused main power lockable disconnect switch, start/stop and optional forward reverse operators with latching emergency stop button. (Controls can be mounted on a remote operator's station or on the main control box panel face). (Please provide motor horsepower, motor amperage, line voltage and specify if a reversing function is needed when ordering) Call for Pricing

name: MG-2 / MG-2T MILLING MACHINE GUARDS
shortDescription: Head-mount milling machine guard for Bridgeport, Sharp, Jet, TRAK, DPM5 and similar mills.
longDescription:
In Stock. Ships the same day if ordered by 3PM EST
Part # variants:
- MG-2 - Standard Model, no interlock. 2.5" sq. bolt pattern (Bridgeport and most copies). $690.00
- MG-2T - Standard Model, no interlock. 3 x 3.5" bolt pattern (Some TRAK machines, DPM5) $690.00

- Articulating arms allow operator to easily position the shield to fit different work-pieces or fixtures

- Head mount milling machine guard will not work if tilting the machine's head left and right (only front/back)
- Includes curved lexan shield
- All CNC billet aluminum construction, Powder coated "OSHA Safety Orange"

variants.label: Interlocked 3 x 3.5" pattern, magnetic safety switch

name: Scissor Gates
shortDescription: Scissor gate, quick access gate, interlocked gate fencing.
longDescription: Expandable rear guarding scissor style gating for guarding areas that require quick and easy access. These scissor gates can span up to 30 feet and are electrically interlocked. These style gates protect personnel from hazards and are particularly useful when applied to the rear area of shears, power presses and press brakes. We offer customizable sizes and side panel "wing" panels to fit the application.

name: SHD-181412F Shield Assembly With 14" x 11¾" x 3/16" Flat Shield and 18" Snake Arm For Bench / Pedestal Grinders
shortDescription: Flat-shield snake-arm assembly for bench/pedestal grinders. Made in USA.
longDescription:
Each flat snake-arm shield assembly consists of a flat polycarbonate shield that is 3/16" thick (0.177" ± 10%), a shield bracket assembly, a snake arm with a direct-mount base, and mounting hardware. The direct-mount base can be fastened to most any flat surface at least 2" x 1" with the included mounting hardware (two ¼"-20 x ¾" hex socket-head cap screws, two ¼"-20 nylon-insert hex locknuts, and two No. 12 pan-head Phillips x 1" zinc-plated sheet-metal screws).

Optional mounting bases and brackets can be added to the direct-mount base to provide additional mounting flexibility. There is a magnetic base, C-clamp base, and horizontal and vertical right-angle brackets. The magnetic base consists of a 3¼"-diameter magnet with 100 pounds of holding force. The C-clamp base can be mounted to a table or ledge up to 1 7/8" thick. The horizontal and vertical right-angle brackets can be helpful in positioning the shield where you need it depending on the position the base is to be mounted.

Our flat snake-arm shields are proudly made in the United States of America!

name: TR-3A DRILL PRESS GUARD (LARGE) WITH INTERLOCK
shortDescription: Large drill press chuck guard with built-in interlock switch for geared head/radial drills.
longDescription:
FEATURES OF THE LARGE DRILL PRESS CHUCK GUARD
This safety shield was designed to be installed on larger machines such as geared head drill presses or small radial drills.

It comes with a built-in interlock switch and mounting bracket.

Do you have a small drill press? If you have a drill press with a motor in the back and pulleys, you might want to consider our model TR-2 drill press chuck guard.

The curved shield design allows three sides of the chuck to be covered. By using the adjustment screw, you can adjust the position of the shield easily.

An interlock switch is included inside the mounting bracket assembly. This protects the switch from any dirt or debris and prevents tampering with the switch.

INSTALLING THIS GUARD:
Watch out! Don't forget to check where you're drilling. Radial drills and geared head drill presses have gearboxes filled with oil. You don't want to drill into an oil reservoir and drain all the oil. Even worst, drilling into a gearbox and breaking something inside. Take your time when drilling into any machine.

name: UGS-1 GRINDER GUARDS BENCH / PEDESTAL
shortDescription: Universal bench grinder shield assembly. Sold as a pair. Direct replacement for Baldor GA10 & GA11.
longDescription:
In stock. Ships the same day if ordered by 3PM EST. SOLD AS A PAIR (left and right hand).

- UGS-2 - Universal Bench Grinder Shield Assembly (PAIR) for 7", 8", 10" Baldor Grinder and other larger bench grinders. 4 x 6" shields. $85.00 each

Bench and Pedestal Grinder Universal Eye Shields and Direct Replacement for Baldor GA10 & GA11 factory eye shields. Powder coated steel bracket with adjustable friction hinge. 1/4" thick polycarbonate/lexan eye shields (not plexiglass!). Replacement shields available. Comes with everything you need to install on your Baldor or other bench grinder. Sold as a pair.
